workflow_records.title: Airway plan documentation-only review
workflow_records.population: Patients undergoing assessed anesthesia or procedural care; emergency and specialty airway contexts require separate judgment.
workflow_records.intended_setting: Direct for DoH-licensed day-surgery assessment and documentation; broader operative settings remain partial.
workflow_records.classification_rationale: Airway-plan documentation is a clinician-entered peri-anaesthetic documentation purpose, not a symptom-assessment encounter.

workflow_records.title: Airway review documentation
workflow_records.population: Patients receiving anesthesia care, with emergency modification permitted by the source.
workflow_records.intended_setting: Direct for preanesthesia assessment; postoperative-only or emergency airway management is outside scope.
workflow_records.classification_rationale: Airway-plan documentation is a clinician-entered peri-anaesthetic documentation purpose, not a symptom-assessment encounter.

workflow_records.title: Anesthesia allergy clarification
workflow_records.population: Patients receiving anesthesia services with a reported medicine, latex, food, or other allergy or reaction history.
workflow_records.intended_setting: Direct for preanesthesia documentation; allergy investigation and diagnosis are outside scope.
workflow_records.classification_rationale: The workflow is a general clinical symptom assessment without a more specific documentation, review, or preventive archetype.

workflow_records.title: ASA status documentation
workflow_records.population: Patients receiving anesthesia services for whom a clinician assigns ASA physical status.
workflow_records.intended_setting: Direct for preanesthesia documentation; classification logic itself is not generated.
workflow_records.classification_rationale: The workflow is administrative or documentation-focused.

workflow_records.title: Blood product discussion documentation
workflow_records.population: Patients undergoing procedures where bleeding, anemia, coagulopathy, transfusion, or patient preference is relevant.
workflow_records.intended_setting: Direct for perioperative discussion documentation; transfusion decisions remain clinician-led.
workflow_records.classification_rationale: The workflow is an imaging-result review.

workflow_records.title: Chronic pain pre-op documentation
workflow_records.population: Surgical patients with chronic pain or preoperative opioid use.
workflow_records.intended_setting: Direct for preoperative history and documentation; management requires the perioperative and pain team.
workflow_records.classification_rationale: The workflow describes peri-anaesthetic assessment or documentation.

workflow_records.title: Anesthesia clinic referral documentation
workflow_records.population: Elective or urgent surgical patients whose clinician considers preoperative anesthesia review or specialist input.
workflow_records.intended_setting: Direct for documenting an already selected referral pathway; broad outpatient referral logic is unsupported.
workflow_records.classification_rationale: The workflow describes peri-anaesthetic assessment or documentation.

workflow_records.title: Anesthesia consent discussion documentation
workflow_records.population: Patients receiving anesthesia services who participate in clinician-led consent, subject to capacity, proxy, emergency, and local-law qualifications.
workflow_records.intended_setting: Direct for recording completed preanesthesia consent discussion; legal sufficiency is outside scope.
workflow_records.classification_rationale: The workflow describes peri-anaesthetic assessment or documentation.

workflow_records.title: Day surgery anesthesia screening
workflow_records.population: Patients considered for planned day surgery or procedure services.
workflow_records.intended_setting: Direct for DoH-licensed Abu Dhabi day-surgery services; other settings require local policy.
workflow_records.classification_rationale: The workflow is screening or preventive care.

workflow_records.title: Difficult airway history documentation
workflow_records.population: Patients with previous anesthesia or airway history who are being assessed for anesthesia care.
workflow_records.intended_setting: Direct for preanesthesia history and focused examination; active airway emergency care is outside scope.
workflow_records.classification_rationale: Airway-plan documentation is a clinician-entered peri-anaesthetic documentation purpose, not a symptom-assessment encounter.

workflow_records.title: Anesthesia equipment issue documentation
workflow_records.population: Patients undergoing surgery or procedures where an anesthesia or procedural equipment issue was identified.
workflow_records.intended_setting: Direct for operating-room or procedural Sign Out documentation; biomedical engineering and incident-management processes remain separate.
workflow_records.classification_rationale: The workflow describes peri-anaesthetic assessment or documentation.

workflow_records.title: Anesthesia family history documentation
workflow_records.population: Patients undergoing preanesthesia history review where a relevant family anesthesia or inherited-risk history is discussed.
workflow_records.intended_setting: Direct for preanesthesia history documentation; genetic counseling, testing, and management remain specialist-led.
workflow_records.classification_rationale: The workflow describes peri-anaesthetic assessment or documentation.

workflow_records.title: Fasting status documentation
workflow_records.population: Healthy elective-procedure patients in the source, with explicit modification needed for pregnancy, obesity, diabetes, reflux, obstruction, emergency, and difficult airway.
workflow_records.intended_setting: Direct for elective preprocedure assessment only; emergency and modified-risk pathways remain clinician-led.

workflow_records.title: Anesthesia handover documentation
workflow_records.population: Patients transferred after anesthesia care to PACU or an equivalent recovery location.

workflow_records.title: Intraoperative event documentation prompt
workflow_records.population: Patients receiving procedural or surgical anesthesia when an intraoperative event requires documentation.

workflow_records.title: Line placement documentation prompt
workflow_records.population: Patients receiving anesthesia care in whom a vascular or other line was placed and documented.

workflow_records.title: Malignant hyperthermia history documentation

workflow_records.title: Medication allergy review anesthesia
workflow_records.population: Patients receiving anesthesia services with a reported medication allergy or adverse reaction history.

workflow_records.population: Patients receiving anesthesia services whose current medicines require clinician review.

workflow_records.title: Neuraxial anesthesia follow-up
workflow_records.population: Patients receiving regional or neuraxial anesthesia; opioid-specific monitoring evidence applies only when neuraxial opioids were used.

workflow_records.title: Obstructive sleep apnea anesthesia review

workflow_records.title: PACU delirium observation documentation

workflow_records.title: PACU discharge criteria documentation
workflow_records.population: Patients being considered for discharge from PACU or equivalent recovery.

workflow_records.title: PACU pain documentation
workflow_records.population: Patients recovering from anesthesia or sedation who undergo pain assessment.

workflow_records.population: Day-surgery and PACU patients whose pain score is assessed and reviewed.

workflow_records.population: Patients receiving anesthesia or perioperative care when advance directives, values, preferences, or treatment goals are relevant and discussed.

workflow_records.title: Rosacea

workflow_records.classification_rationale: The workflow is administrative or documentation-focused.

workflow_records.population: Any adult or child for whom an emergency clinician is considering or has decided admission; condition, age and service-specific requirements vary.

workflow_records.population: Adults and children with a suspected allergic reaction; exact support is strongest for suspected medicine-related reactions, while food, venom, contact and idiopathic reactions remain less directly covered.

workflow_records.population: Adults and children with clinician-suspected anaphylaxis; pregnancy, infants, comorbidity and refractory reactions require qualified review.

workflow_records.population: Adults with acute low back pain; pediatric, pregnancy, trauma, postoperative and non-lumbar presentations require separate evidence.

workflow_records.title: ED blood test result documentation
workflow_records.population: Adults or children whose ED-requested pathology result is reviewed; the clinical meaning depends on the individual presentation and test.
workflow_records.intended_setting: Emergency department result-review governance and communication.
workflow_records.classification_rationale: The workflow is a laboratory or test-result review.

workflow_records.title: ED burn documentation
workflow_records.population: Adults and children with thermal, chemical, electrical or other burn injury; inhalation, major burns, safeguarding, pregnancy and comorbidity require qualified emergency review.
workflow_records.intended_setting: DHA virtual guidance domains partially transfer to in-person UAE emergency documentation.
workflow_records.classification_rationale: The workflow is administrative or documentation-focused.

workflow_records.title: ED capacity discussion documentation
workflow_records.population: Patients whose capacity for a specific decision at a specific time is questioned; pediatric consent, guardianship, emergencies and mental-health law need separate qualified review.

workflow_records.title: ED chest pain documentation
workflow_records.population: Adults with chest pain; pediatric, pregnancy, trauma, postoperative and established-diagnosis pathways require separate evidence.
workflow_records.intended_setting: DHA virtual-care documentation domains partially transfer to UAE emergency assessment.
workflow_records.classification_rationale: The workflow is administrative or documentation-focused.

workflow_records.title: ED COPD exacerbation documentation
workflow_records.population: Adults with clinician-established COPD and a possible acute exacerbation; asthma, heart failure, pneumonia, pulmonary embolism and other mimics require separate assessment.

workflow_records.title: ED critical incident documentation
workflow_records.population: Any patient involved in a critical clinical incident; exact content varies by incident, harm, legal status and facility policy.
workflow_records.intended_setting: Emergency clinical records and separate organisational incident-reporting systems.

workflow_records.title: ED death verification documentation-only
workflow_records.population: A deceased adult or child; expected, unexpected, traumatic, forensic, pediatric and infectious deaths have different requirements.
workflow_records.intended_setting: Emergency department or hospital verification before applicable certification and notification processes.

workflow_records.title: ED diarrhea documentation
workflow_records.population: Adults with acute diarrhea; children, pregnancy, chronic diarrhea, inflammatory bowel disease, immunocompromise and recent surgery require separate assessment.
workflow_records.intended_setting: DHA virtual-care documentation domains partially transfer to UAE emergency assessment.
workflow_records.classification_rationale: The workflow is administrative or documentation-focused.

workflow_records.title: ED discharge documentation
workflow_records.population: Adults and children discharged directly from an ED; condition-specific, safeguarding, mental-health and high-risk discharge requirements may add obligations.

workflow_records.classification_rationale: The workflow is administrative or documentation-focused.

workflow_records.title: ED dizziness documentation
workflow_records.population: Adults with dizziness; children, pregnancy, trauma, intoxication and major neurologic or cardiovascular presentations require separate assessment.
workflow_records.intended_setting: DHA virtual-care domains partially transfer to UAE ED documentation.
workflow_records.classification_rationale: The workflow is administrative or documentation-focused.

workflow_records.title: ED domestic violence screening documentation
workflow_records.population: WHO evidence primarily addresses women experiencing intimate-partner or sexual violence; men, people under 18, elders, dependent adults and non-partner violence require separate evidence.

workflow_records.title: ED ear nose throat presentation
workflow_records.population: Adults or children with an undifferentiated ear, nose or throat complaint; airway, bleeding, infection, trauma and foreign-body contexts differ materially.
workflow_records.intended_setting: Emergency assessment with condition-specific ENT pathways.

workflow_records.title: ED ECG documentation
workflow_records.population: Any adult or child for whom an ECG was performed; age, indication, rhythm and clinical context vary.
workflow_records.intended_setting: Emergency ECG acquisition and clinician interpretation documentation.

workflow_records.title: ED eye injury documentation
workflow_records.population: Adults and children with possible eye injury; exact support is strongest for corneal abrasion and urgent anterior-eye presentations.

workflow_records.title: ED fall documentation
workflow_records.population: NICE exact evidence covers people 65+ and higher-risk people 50–64; WHO trauma domains broaden mechanism assessment but do not provide a complete pediatric or younger-adult falls pathway.

workflow_records.title: ED family update documentation
workflow_records.population: Patients for whom a family or representative update is considered; consent, capacity, age, guardianship and confidentiality vary.

workflow_records.title: ED fever documentation
workflow_records.population: Broad fever workflow spanning adults and children; NICE sepsis evidence applies when sepsis is suspected and DHA evidence applies to pediatric fever, leaving many non-sepsis adult presentations incompletely covered.

workflow_records.title: ED fracture suspicion documentation

workflow_records.title: ED handover documentation
workflow_records.population: Adults and children receiving emergency care; WHO BEC evidence is strongest for acute illness or trauma and does not define every interdepartmental handover field.
workflow_records.intended_setting: Emergency transfer, referral and disposition documentation.
workflow_records.classification_rationale: The workflow is administrative or documentation-focused.

workflow_records.title: ED headache documentation
workflow_records.population: Adults with headache; children, pregnancy/postpartum, trauma and established neurological disease require separate assessment.
workflow_records.intended_setting: DHA virtual-care domains partially transfer to UAE emergency documentation.
workflow_records.classification_rationale: The workflow is administrative or documentation-focused.

workflow_records.title: ED imaging result documentation
workflow_records.population: Adults or children whose ED-requested imaging report is reviewed; applicability depends on modality, anatomy and presentation.
workflow_records.intended_setting: Emergency department radiology-report review, communication, responsibility and follow-up.
workflow_records.classification_rationale: The workflow is an imaging-result review.

workflow_records.title: ED interpreter documentation
workflow_records.population: Patients requiring language or communication support; age, capacity, disability, safeguarding and confidentiality alter requirements.
workflow_records.intended_setting: Emergency communication and documentation.
workflow_records.classification_rationale: The workflow is administrative or documentation-focused.

workflow_records.title: ED intoxication documentation
workflow_records.population: Adults or children with suspected alcohol, medicine, drug or mixed intoxication; pregnancy, trauma, safeguarding and withdrawal differ materially.
workflow_records.intended_setting: Emergency medical and mental-health assessment with toxicology support as needed.
workflow_records.classification_rationale: The workflow is administrative or documentation-focused.

workflow_records.title: ED laceration documentation
workflow_records.population: Adults and children with an open wound or laceration; bites, puncture, tendon, nerve, vascular, facial, hand, genital and contaminated wounds need additional expertise.
workflow_records.intended_setting: Emergency trauma and wound assessment.
workflow_records.classification_rationale: The workflow is administrative or documentation-focused.

workflow_records.title: ED medication administration documentation
workflow_records.population: Any adult or child receiving a medicine in emergency care; requirements vary by medicine, route, indication, age and monitoring.
workflow_records.intended_setting: Emergency medication administration and electronic medication records.
workflow_records.classification_rationale: The workflow concerns medication initiation, monitoring, or review.

workflow_records.title: ED mental health presentation documentation
workflow_records.population: Adults and children with a primary mental-health presentation; age-specific, neurodevelopmental, intoxication, medical and safeguarding contexts require qualified review.
workflow_records.intended_setting: Emergency mental-health triage, assessment and liaison working.
workflow_records.classification_rationale: The workflow is administrative or documentation-focused.

workflow_records.title: ED minor head injury documentation
workflow_records.population: Adults and children with possible minor head injury; anticoagulation, infancy, older age, seizure, penetrating injury and polytrauma require additional assessment.
workflow_records.intended_setting: DHA virtual-care domains partially transfer to UAE emergency in-person assessment.
workflow_records.classification_rationale: The workflow is administrative or documentation-focused.

workflow_records.title: ED observation-unit review
workflow_records.population: Adults and children under ED observation; WHO BEC evidence is strongest for acute illness or trauma and is not a complete observation-unit standard.
workflow_records.intended_setting: Emergency observation and reassessment before clinician disposition.
workflow_records.classification_rationale: The workflow is a general clinical symptom assessment without a more specific documentation, review, or preventive archetype.

workflow_records.title: ED overdose documentation-only
workflow_records.population: NICE and RCEM exact mappings apply mainly to overdose in a self-harm context; accidental, recreational, occupational and pediatric ingestions remain incompletely covered.
workflow_records.intended_setting: Emergency physical and mental-health assessment after self-poisoning.
workflow_records.classification_rationale: The workflow concerns medication initiation, monitoring, or review.

workflow_records.title: ED patient declined care documentation
workflow_records.population: Patients declining assessment, treatment, admission, transfer or follow-up; children, impaired capacity, emergencies and mental-health law require specific review.
workflow_records.intended_setting: Emergency decision-making and documentation.
workflow_records.classification_rationale: The workflow is administrative or documentation-focused.

workflow_records.title: ED pediatric fever documentation
workflow_records.population: Children with fever; neonates, immunocompromised children and children with complex conditions require urgent age- and condition-specific review.
workflow_records.intended_setting: DHA virtual pediatric assessment partially transfers to UAE ED documentation.
workflow_records.classification_rationale: The workflow is explicitly paediatric.

workflow_records.title: ED pediatric injury documentation
workflow_records.population: Children and young people with injury; developmental stage, mechanism, supervision and safeguarding context require age-appropriate assessment.
workflow_records.intended_setting: Emergency pediatric trauma and safeguarding assessment.
workflow_records.classification_rationale: The workflow is explicitly paediatric.

workflow_records.title: ED pelvic pain documentation
workflow_records.population: RCOG evidence covers women with chronic pelvic pain; NICE evidence covers possible early-pregnancy complications. Acute non-pregnancy, pediatric, male and postoperative pelvic pain remain incompletely covered.
workflow_records.intended_setting: Emergency pelvic-pain assessment with gynecology or early-pregnancy pathways when applicable.
workflow_records.classification_rationale: The workflow is administrative or documentation-focused.

workflow_records.title: ED pregnancy bleeding documentation
workflow_records.population: People with bleeding in early pregnancy; later gestation, postpartum bleeding, trauma and non-pregnancy bleeding require different pathways.
workflow_records.intended_setting: Emergency and early-pregnancy assessment services.
workflow_records.classification_rationale: The workflow is pregnancy or obstetric care.

workflow_records.title: ED procedural sedation documentation prompt
workflow_records.population: Adults and children excluding neonates undergoing clinician-decided ED procedural sedation; pregnancy, older age and major comorbidity require additional review.
workflow_records.intended_setting: Emergency procedural sedation by credentialed teams with local governance.
workflow_records.classification_rationale: The workflow is administrative or documentation-focused.

workflow_records.title: ED procedure note documentation prompt
workflow_records.population: Adults and children undergoing an invasive or high-risk ED procedure; procedure-specific contraindications and competencies remain separate.
workflow_records.intended_setting: Emergency procedures performed by qualified staff under local policy.
workflow_records.classification_rationale: The workflow documents a procedure or procedure-related care.

workflow_records.title: ED reattendance documentation
workflow_records.population: Adults or children returning after a recent emergency visit; timing, reason, previous outcome and current acuity vary.
workflow_records.intended_setting: Emergency reassessment after prior attendance.
workflow_records.classification_rationale: The workflow is administrative or documentation-focused.

workflow_records.title: ED referral documentation
workflow_records.population: Adults or children for whom an ED clinician has already decided or discussed referral; specialty and urgency vary.
workflow_records.intended_setting: Emergency referral, transfer and discharge handover.
workflow_records.classification_rationale: The workflow prepares or documents a referral.

workflow_records.title: ED renal colic documentation
workflow_records.population: Adults, children or pregnant people with suspected or confirmed renal/ureteric stones; the imaging and management pathway is population-specific.
workflow_records.intended_setting: Emergency and urology assessment; exact mappings are limited to already performed/reviewed results and clinician-entered follow-up.
workflow_records.classification_rationale: The workflow is administrative or documentation-focused.

workflow_records.title: ED safeguarding documentation
workflow_records.population: Exact evidence covers children/young people and adult women experiencing IPV; vulnerable adults, men, elders, trafficking and other safeguarding contexts remain incompletely covered.
workflow_records.intended_setting: Emergency recognition, assessment and documentation of safeguarding concern.
workflow_records.classification_rationale: The workflow is administrative or documentation-focused.

workflow_records.title: ED safety-net documentation
workflow_records.population: Adults and children discharged or managed with clinician-confirmed safety-net discussion; condition-specific warning features differ.
workflow_records.intended_setting: Emergency discharge and transition communication.
workflow_records.classification_rationale: The workflow is administrative or documentation-focused.

workflow_records.title: ED seizure documentation
workflow_records.population: Children, young people and adults with a suspected or confirmed seizure; pregnancy, neonates, status, intoxication and acute symptomatic causes require additional pathways.
workflow_records.intended_setting: Emergency initial seizure assessment and communication.
workflow_records.classification_rationale: The workflow describes an emergency or urgent presentation.

workflow_records.title: ED self-harm documentation prompts
workflow_records.population: Children, young people and adults after self-harm; age, method, physical injury, intoxication, neurodevelopmental, safeguarding and legal context require qualified review.
workflow_records.intended_setting: Emergency physical and psychosocial assessment after self-harm.
workflow_records.classification_rationale: The workflow is administrative or documentation-focused.

workflow_records.title: ED shortness of breath documentation
workflow_records.population: Exact chronic-source coverage is limited to adults with persistent breathlessness; WHO material adds broad acute-care documentation but not a breathlessness-specific diagnostic pathway. Paediatric, pregnancy or postpartum, postoperative, traumatic, frail and immunocompromised presentations require separate review.
workflow_records.intended_setting: Emergency documentation with partial support from a chronic primary-care pathway and general first-contact emergency guidance.
workflow_records.classification_rationale: The workflow is administrative or documentation-focused.

workflow_records.title: ED sprain documentation
workflow_records.population: People with sprain- or strain-compatible injuries suitable for assessment; open injury, major trauma, neurovascular compromise, infection and fracture concern require distinct pathways.
workflow_records.intended_setting: DHA telehealth evidence is direct for Dubai virtual care and partial for in-person emergency documentation.
workflow_records.classification_rationale: The workflow is administrative or documentation-focused.

workflow_records.title: ED syncope documentation
workflow_records.population: People aged 16 years and older with suspected transient loss of consciousness; paediatric syncope and non-TLoC falls require separate evidence.
workflow_records.intended_setting: Initial and emergency assessment of suspected transient loss of consciousness.
workflow_records.classification_rationale: The workflow is administrative or documentation-focused.

workflow_records.title: ED testicular pain documentation
workflow_records.population: Adults or children with acute or chronic testicular pain; age, trauma, infection, torsion, hernia and referred pain contexts differ materially.
workflow_records.intended_setting: Emergency assessment of undifferentiated testicular pain.
workflow_records.classification_rationale: The workflow is administrative or documentation-focused.

workflow_records.title: ED transfer documentation
workflow_records.population: Adults and children in first-contact emergency care when transfer has already been assessed or arranged.
workflow_records.intended_setting: Emergency referral and interfacility handover; WHO BEC is broad international guidance.
workflow_records.classification_rationale: The workflow is administrative or documentation-focused.

workflow_records.title: ED triage documentation
workflow_records.population: Adults and children presenting to first-contact emergency care; neonates, pregnancy and specialty presentations may require separate triage pathways.
workflow_records.intended_setting: First-contact emergency triage documentation.
workflow_records.classification_rationale: The workflow is administrative or documentation-focused.

workflow_records.title: ED urinary symptoms documentation
workflow_records.population: Adults or children with dysuria, frequency, urgency, retention, haematuria, incontinence or other urinary symptoms; sex, pregnancy and systemic illness change the pathway.
workflow_records.intended_setting: Emergency assessment of undifferentiated urinary symptoms.
workflow_records.classification_rationale: The workflow is administrative or documentation-focused.

workflow_records.title: ED violence/aggression incident documentation
workflow_records.population: Adults, children or young people involved in violence or aggression; age, mental state, intoxication, injury, pregnancy and setting alter requirements.
workflow_records.intended_setting: NICE includes emergency-department involvement but much of the detailed source is mental-health inpatient guidance, so the mapping is partial.
workflow_records.classification_rationale: The workflow is administrative or documentation-focused.

workflow_records.title: ED vomiting documentation
workflow_records.population: People with nausea or vomiting; the DHA applicability section does not state a precise age range and pregnancy, paediatric, postoperative and immunocompromised presentations require added review.
workflow_records.intended_setting: Dubai telehealth evidence with partial applicability to in-person emergency assessment.
workflow_records.classification_rationale: The workflow is administrative or documentation-focused.

workflow_records.title: ED wound documentation
workflow_records.population: Adults and children with open wounds or lacerations; bites, burns, penetrating injuries, major trauma, surgical wounds and high-risk hosts require distinct evidence.
workflow_records.intended_setting: First-contact emergency wound assessment.
workflow_records.classification_rationale: The workflow documents a procedure or procedure-related care.

workflow_records.title: Adrenal incidentaloma
workflow_records.population: Partial: age, pregnancy, frailty, lesion, hormonal, and malignancy-risk qualifiers are not fully represented in the legacy workflow.
workflow_records.intended_setting: Partial: exact for incidentaloma assessment and qualified follow-up, not diagnosis, surgery, or treatment.
workflow_records.classification_rationale: The workflow prepares or documents a referral.

workflow_records.title: Adrenal incidentaloma result review
workflow_records.population: People with an incidentally identified adrenal mass; pregnancy, youth, frailty, known malignancy and hereditary syndromes require additional review.
workflow_records.intended_setting: Endocrine and multidisciplinary incidentaloma result review.

workflow_records.title: B12 deficiency endocrine review
workflow_records.population: People aged 16 years and older; paediatric cases and condition-specific pregnancy, breastfeeding, surgery, nitrous-oxide and neurological contexts require qualified review.

workflow_records.classification_rationale: The workflow is a general clinical symptom assessment without a more specific documentation, review, or preventive archetype.

workflow_records.title: Bone density result review

workflow_records.population: People with calcium findings that may indicate primary hyperparathyroidism; paediatric, pregnancy, renal, oncology, acute severe and hypocalcaemia contexts require separate evidence.

workflow_records.classification_rationale: The workflow is a laboratory or test-result review.

workflow_records.title: Cold intolerance endocrine documentation
workflow_records.population: Adults or children reporting cold intolerance; thyroid, anaemia, medication, environmental, nutritional and other contexts differ.
workflow_records.intended_setting: Undifferentiated endocrine symptom documentation.

workflow_records.title: Continuous glucose monitor review
workflow_records.population: People with diabetes using CGM; age, pregnancy, treatment, caregiver role and device type require individual review.

workflow_records.title: Diabetes medication review

workflow_records.title: Diabetic kidney screening result review

workflow_records.population: Adult men with erectile-function concerns; the workflow must not be applied to other sexual-function presentations without review.

workflow_records.title: Excessive sweating endocrine review
workflow_records.population: Adults or children with focal or generalized excessive sweating; endocrine, medication, infection, malignancy and autonomic contexts differ.

workflow_records.title: Fracture risk documentation
workflow_records.population: Primarily adults over 50 years in the DoH screening population; younger adults, children, pregnancy and secondary bone disease require separate evidence.

workflow_records.title: Goiter symptom review
workflow_records.population: Adults, children and young people with thyroid enlargement, subject to age, function, nodularity and compression qualifiers.

workflow_records.population: People with diabetes; age, pregnancy, diabetes type, haemoglobin variants, red-cell turnover and comorbidity affect interpretation.

workflow_records.population: Adults or children reporting heat intolerance; thyroid, menopause, medication, autonomic, environmental and infection contexts differ.

workflow_records.title: Hirsutism review
workflow_records.population: Premenopausal women with hirsutism; postmenopausal, paediatric, pregnancy and isolated local-hair presentations require separate assessment.
workflow_records.intended_setting: Outpatient hirsutism review by a clinician.

workflow_records.title: Home glucose log review
workflow_records.population: People using capillary blood-glucose monitoring; DHA evidence is directly applicable only to adults with type 2 diabetes in licensed telehealth services.

workflow_records.population: People with clinician-recognised hyperglycaemia; pregnancy, children, type 1 diabetes and acute metabolic decompensation require distinct pathways.

workflow_records.title: Thyroid symptoms

workflow_records.intended_setting: Partial: exact for suspected-thyroid-dysfunction testing, thyroid-enlargement warning symptoms, and clinician-led referral context, not diagnosis from a symptom list.
workflow_records.classification_rationale: The workflow is a general clinical symptom assessment without a more specific documentation, review, or preventive archetype.

workflow_records.title: Vitamin D deficiency endocrine follow-up
workflow_records.population: People with clinician-established vitamin D deficiency or insufficiency; children, pregnancy, renal disease, malabsorption, granulomatous disease, and osteoporosis require distinct evidence.
workflow_records.intended_setting: Primary or endocrine outpatient follow-up.
workflow_records.classification_rationale: The workflow is an interval chronic-care review.

workflow_records.title: Weight loss endocrine review
workflow_records.population: People with intentional or unintentional weight loss presented for endocrine review; age, pregnancy, frailty, eating-disorder, cancer, infection, and chronic-disease contexts differ.
workflow_records.intended_setting: Primary or endocrine outpatient assessment with acute or severe presentations requiring separate pathways.
workflow_records.classification_rationale: The workflow is a general clinical symptom assessment without a more specific documentation, review, or preventive archetype.

workflow_records.title: Weight management endocrine review
workflow_records.population: Adults, children, and young people in clinician-led weight-management review, subject to age-specific criteria; pregnancy and eating disorders require separate pathways.
workflow_records.intended_setting: Primary, endocrine, paediatric, or specialist outpatient weight-management review.
workflow_records.classification_rationale: The workflow is a general clinical symptom assessment without a more specific documentation, review, or preventive archetype.

workflow_records.title: Adenoid symptom documentation
workflow_records.population: Children under 12 with hearing or nasal symptoms potentially associated with adenoid context; adolescents, adults, isolated nasal obstruction, and sleep-disordered breathing require different evidence.
workflow_records.intended_setting: Primary, paediatric, audiology, or ENT outpatient symptom documentation.
workflow_records.classification_rationale: The workflow is administrative or documentation-focused.

workflow_records.title: Allergic rhinitis
workflow_records.population: Direct for adults and children presenting with allergic-rhinitis complaints, with medicine and age qualifiers not mapped.
workflow_records.intended_setting: Direct for DHA-licensed telehealth; partial for in-person nasal, throat, ear, or neck examination.
workflow_records.classification_rationale: The workflow is a general clinical symptom assessment without a more specific documentation, review, or preventive archetype.

workflow_records.title: Audiology referral documentation
workflow_records.population: Adults over 18 with hearing difficulty; children and screening-program referrals require separate pathways.
workflow_records.intended_setting: Primary, community, ENT, or audiology referral documentation.

workflow_records.title: Balance clinic follow-up
workflow_records.population: Adults in balance follow-up when a BPPV or positional-vertigo context is clinician-confirmed; children and non-BPPV balance disorders need separate evidence.
workflow_records.intended_setting: ENT, audiovestibular, physiotherapy, neurology, or multidisciplinary balance follow-up.
workflow_records.classification_rationale: The workflow is an interval chronic-care review.

workflow_records.title: Barotrauma ear symptoms
workflow_records.population: People with ear symptoms after flying, diving, hyperbaric exposure, blast, or other pressure change; diving and blast injury require distinct pathways.
workflow_records.intended_setting: Primary, urgent, emergency, occupational, travel, diving, or ENT assessment.
workflow_records.classification_rationale: The workflow describes an emergency or urgent presentation.

workflow_records.title: BPPV follow-up
workflow_records.population: Adults aged 18 years or older with clinician-established or suspected BPPV follow-up; children and central or non-positional vertigo require separate evidence.
workflow_records.intended_setting: Primary, ENT, audiovestibular, physiotherapy, or neurology follow-up.
workflow_records.classification_rationale: The workflow is an interval chronic-care review.

workflow_records.title: Cerumen impaction
workflow_records.population: Partial: AAO-HNSF applies to people older than 6 months with cerumen impaction and specified exclusions; NICE hearing guidance applies to adults over 18.
